content.text:
Looking at the image, the car is on the gravel/grass area to the left of the track with the asphalt road visible to the right — the car is significantly off the racing line and needs to steer right to return to the track.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 117, target = (117 + 5) % 121 = 122 % 121 = 1
- Target WP index 1: x=3.2095, y=0.6831
- Car: x=2.8220, y=0.9898, heading=7.538°
- dy = 0.6831 - 0.9898 = -0.3067
- dx = 3.2095 - 2.8220 = 0.3875
- bearing = atan2(-0.3067, 0.3875) = -38.35°
- delta = -38.35° - 7.538° = -45.89°
- Normalize: -45.89° → waypoint is to the RIGHT → negative steering

Delta = -45.89°, still a sharp right correction needed. Car remains on gravel (y=0.990 vs centerline y=0.683), distance_from_center=0.307m. Continue maximum right steering.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Car remains on gravel far left of center (y=0.990 vs centerline y=0.683, dist=0.307m) with delta=-45.89° to target waypoint, requiring continued maximum right steering to return to asphalt.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Positive steering = left turn (CCW), negative = right turn (CW)",
    "Track centerline y~0.683 on this straight section; car y~0.990 means car is far left of center",
    "Car has been persistently left of center (y: 0.994→0.995→0.990) — correction very slow at 0.75 speed",
    "When delta > 40°, use speed=0.75 and steering=-25 for maximum correction",
    "Track runs nearly due east for next ~20 waypoints (y stays ~0.68)",
    "Once delta < 5°, switch to 0 steering to avoid oscillation",
    "Track width 0.76m — very narrow, precision required",
    "Progress 98.7% — nearly complete lap, stay on track at all costs",
    "Car is on gravel/grass edge — need maximum right correction now",
    "Heading ~7.5° but need bearing ~-38° — large negative delta persists despite -25° steering"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [2.704, 2.772, 2.822],
    "y": [0.994, 0.995, 0.990],
    "yaw": [12.97, 10.41, 7.54]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP1 at (3.210, 0.683): dy=-0.307, dx=0.388, bearing=-38.35°, delta=-45.89° → sharp right correction needed",
  "speed": 0.75,
  "steering_angle": -25.0
}
```
